title: Brotein onboarding paywall — 3-day free trial, $7.99/mo or $47/yr
html:
Brotein's in-app paywall — sells Anabolic Breakdown / Menu analysis / AI Scanning / Brotein Streak. Pricing: $7.99/mo or $3.91/mo billed yearly, behind a 3-day free trial. "Just eat Bro, we will handle the science" tagline.

brotein · subscription monetization · anabolic scoring · brotein streak
